assertions.assertion: Program.cs sets Authentication.CookieLifetime to 8 hours and CookieSlidingExpiration to false
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md Pattern 11 states 'Set CookieSlidingExpiration = false and a fixed CookieLifetime'

assertions.assertion: Program.cs calls AddServerSideSessions() on the IdentityServer builder
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md Pattern 11 states 'Enable server-side sessions via idsvrBuilder.AddServerSideSessions()'

assertions.assertion: The web.app client has BackChannelLogoutUri set to a valid HTTPS URL
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md Pattern 11 states 'Set BackChannelLogoutUri on each client'
